narrative:
Windham Township has 1,189 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.2 percentage points.
